inputs.label: Fence Length
inputs.businessContext: Total horizontal length of the fence line (meters).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total horizontal length of the fence line (meters).

inputs.label: Fence Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the fence from ground to top (meters).

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the fence from ground to top (meters).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çitin yerden tepeye kadar olan yüksekliği (metre).
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe des Zauns vom Boden bis zur Oberkante (Meter)

inputs.label: Picket Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of each individual fence board or picket (meters).

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of each individual fence board or picket (meters).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir çit tahtasının veya çıtanın genişliği (metre).
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite jedes einzelnen Zaunbretts oder jeder Latte (Meter)

inputs.label: Picket Spacing
inputs.businessContext: Gap between adjacent pickets (meters). Use 0 for solid fence.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gap between adjacent pickets (meters). Use 0 for solid fence.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitişik çıtalar arasındaki boşluk (metre). Dolu çit için 0 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand zwischen benachbarten Latten (Meter). Verwenden Sie 0 für einen geschlossenen Zaun.

inputs.label: Coverage per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Stain coverage area per liter as per manufacturer data (m² per L).

businessContext_i18n.en: Stain coverage area per liter as per manufacturer data (m² per L).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretici verilerine göre litre başına vernik kaplama alanı (m²/L).
businessContext_i18n.de: Abdeckungsfläche der Lasur pro Liter gemäß Herstellerangaben (m² pro L)

inputs.label: Number of Coats
inputs.businessContext: Number of stain coats to apply (typ. 2 for durability).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of stain coats to apply (typ. 2 for durability).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygulanacak vernik kat sayısı (dayanıklılık için tipik olarak 2).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der aufzutragenden Lasurschichten (typ. 2 für Haltbarkeit)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
